description_long: This is a classic black mortarboard graduation cap, featuring a large, flat, square board on top and a round, fitted base designed to sit securely on the head. The cap is adorned with a gold and black tassel attached at the center of the board, which hangs down from one corner. The surface of the board is smooth and matte, giving it a formal and understated appearance. The base appears to be made of a slightly softer, fabric-covered material to provide comfort for the wearer. The tassel is composed of multiple fine threads, adding a touch of ceremonial elegance. This type of hat is typically worn during academic graduation ceremonies and is instantly recognizable in urban or campus settings.
description: A black mortarboard graduation cap with a flat square top and a gold and black tassel, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a round, fitted base.
description_view_0: The cap is seen from an angle highlighting the gold and black tassel hanging from the left front corner, with the flat square board and round base clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the cap from the opposite side, with the tassel less visible and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the board emphasized.
description_view_2: The cap is viewed from the back, showing the flat square board and the round base, with the tassel not visible from this angle.
description_view_3: The tassel is prominently displayed hanging from the right front corner, with the flat board and round base both clearly visible.
